settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Changes the language across the entire app.
settings.crossfadeHint: Mixes the next track over the current one
settings.infinitePlaybackHint: Queue auto-extends with similar tracks when it runs out.

profile.label: Profile
profile.premiumTagline: Lossless streaming and full HiFi for 99 ⭐ a month. Pay right inside Telegram — no cards, no sites.
profile.tidalQualityHint: Depends on the Tidal proxy account — unavailable qualities are downgraded to whatever the account can stream.
profile.offlineQualityHint: Quality at which tracks are saved to your device for offline playback. If the chosen tier is unavailable, the next-best tier is downloaded.

linkedAccounts.title: Linked accounts
linkedAccounts.hint: Sign in with either Telegram or email — both open the same account.
linkedAccounts.telegramExpired: The Telegram link expired. Please try again.
linkedAccounts.telegramConflict: This Telegram account is already linked to another user.
linkedAccounts.telegramStartFailed: Couldn't start the Telegram link. Try again later.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.hint: Devices currently signed in to your account. You can end any session.
sessions.logoutAll: Log out from every other device
sessions.logoutAllError: Couldn't log out the other sessions
sessions.logoutAllNoOthers: No sessions other than the current one

rooms.shortcutHint: Spin up your own room or hop in by invite link.

list.confirmDelete: Delete this room? This can’t be undone — every member loses access.
list.heroDescription: Spin up a room and stay in sync with friends. Anyone can queue tracks and steer the player; crossfade and shuffle stay off so the playback never drifts.
list.empty: No rooms yet. Spin up a new one or join with a friend’s code.

page.confirmDelete: Delete this room? This can’t be undone — every member loses access.
page.placeholderTrack: Drop any track and the whole room hears it.
page.controlsHint: Playback controls live in the mini-player below. Whatever you hear, the room hears.
page.hostOnlyHint: Members can listen along, but only you can switch tracks.
page.hostOnlySaveError: Couldn’t save the setting. Try again.
page.listenOnlyNote: Host turned on listen-only — only the host can change tracks.
page.howWorksAll: Anyone can drive playback and queue tracks — whatever you hear, the whole room hears.
page.howWorksHostOnly: Anyone can drive playback — whatever you hear, the whole room hears.
page.howWorksItem2: Volume and mute are personal in the mini-player. Crossfade and shuffle are off here so playback never drifts.
page.howWorksItem3: If the connection blips, it self-heals. The track’s start position is stored on the host and resyncs every couple of seconds.
page.shareText:
We’re listening together! Open the link — it joins you automatically:
{url}

chat.title: Room chat
chat.empty: Quiet so far. Drop a message — everyone sees it.

subscription.headline: Music, no compromises
subscription.tagline: 99 Telegram Stars a month. Charged inside the bot — no cards, no sketchy redirects.
subscription.paymentNote: The bot DMs you an invoice — one tap to pay. Premium switches on the moment payment lands.

benefits.fullCatalog: Full Tidal catalogue, right inside Telegram

player.dailyLimitReached: You've used up today's free listens.

errors.network: Network error while loading the track

authGuard.title: Sign in to keep going
authGuard.body: Hop in with Telegram to unlock search, your library and the player.

emailLogin.errorInvalidEmail: That doesn't look like an email
emailLogin.errorRequest: Could not send the code. Try again later.
emailLogin.errorVerify: Could not verify the code. Try again.

emailPage.title: Sign in to BRATAN MUSIC
emailPage.subtitle: Sign in with Telegram or a one-time email code. No passwords, no sign-up forms.

search.emptyHint: Try a different query or switch the filter.

shortcuts.aiHint: Describe a vibe — we'll spin up the playlist.
shortcuts.waveHint: An endless stream tuned to your taste.
shortcuts.roomsHint: Open a room or join with a code.

library.title: Library
library.emptyHint: Create your first playlist or upload a track.
library.uploadsEmptyHint: Drop an mp3 / flac here or use the upload button.
library.noAlbumsHint: Tap the heart on an album page
library.noArtistsHint: Tap the heart on an artist page
library.noDownloadsHint: Open a track, album, or playlist and tap "Listen offline"

playlist.emptyHint: Add tracks from search or any other playlist.

share_dialog.title: Share playlist
share_dialog.publicHint: Anyone with the link can open it without a BRATAN account.
share_dialog.publicOn: On — anyone with the link can open
share_dialog.publicOff: Right now this playlist is only visible to you
share_dialog.savedHint: People who save your playlist see it in their library as a reference — they can play the tracks, pin and remove their copy, but can't rename it or change its contents.

bannedList.title: Hidden from recommendations
bannedList.hint: Artists and tracks you removed via the "…" menu. They won't appear in the wave, daily playlists, or AI playlists.
bannedList.functionalHint: Excluded from the wave, daily playlists, and AI mixes.
bannedList.empty: Nothing hidden yet. Use the "Hide" actions in any track menu or on the artist page.
bannedList.emptyArtists: Hidden artists will land here. Open an artist page and tap "Hide artist".
bannedList.emptyTracks: Hidden tracks will land here. Open the "…" menu on a track and choose "Hide from recommendations".

override.openHint: Replace the track with a better-matching audio file from Tidal.

ai.title: AI playlist
ai.subtitle: The prompt expands into several Tidal searches across genres, artists and eras in multiple languages — so we catch both Western and other-language catalogs.
ai.placeholderLong: Describe the vibe, genres, tempo, reference artists…
ai.exampleFocus: lo-fi for focus and deep work
ai.errorHint: Try rephrasing or keeping the prompt shorter.
ai.placeholder: Example: "2010s electronica for a long late-night drive"
ai.errPromptTooShort: Describe the playlist in at least a few words
ai.planSummary: How the AI broke down the prompt ({count} searches)
ai.suggestionDeepHouse: Deep house for a long drive

home.subtitle: What's the vibe today?
home.aiPlaylistTitle: Describe a mood — I'll build the playlist
home.aiPlaylistHint: Genres, artists and eras, in any language, in one tap.
home.waveSubtitle: One tap — and the player keeps going. We pick from what you've been playing and weave in adjacent things you haven't heard yet. The more you listen, the sharper it gets.
home.dailyHint: Familiar tracks, fresh discoveries, and a mood-driven mix. Refreshed every morning.
home.dailyError: Couldn't load today's playlists. Try refreshing the page.
home.dailyVariantFamiliarDescription: Favourite artists and brand-new releases close to them
home.dailyVariantDiscoverDescription: Tracks you haven't heard yet that fit your taste
home.dailyVariantMoodDescription: Tuned to your usual listening vibe

landing.heroDescription: Any track that's been muted, cropped or watered down on other platforms gets replaced by your own version. Hear it the way it was meant — no bleeps, no edits. Lossless 24-bit, crossfade, share-by-link playlists — in one tab.
landing.featuresHint: Nine features that make this player worth opening. No marketing fluff — only what actually works.

censorOverlay.title: Lift the censor — your cut
censorOverlay.desc: Drop in the original — it overrides the muted or cropped catalogue track for you. No one else sees the swap.

lossless24.title: 24-bit lossless
lossless24.desc: If a master exists, you hear the master. No 128 kbps mp3s with HD badges painted on top.

listenTogether.title: Listen together
listenTogether.desc: Spin up a room, share the link. Everyone's player stays synced to the millisecond, the chat reacts live, the host runs the queue.

aiPlaylists.title: Playlists on demand
aiPlaylists.desc: Describe a mood or a scene — the AI builds a playlist out of the real catalogue. Save it, play it, no editing needed.

eq10band.title: 10-band EQ
eq10band.desc: Your own presets for headphones, the car, the kitchen. Set it once — it follows you across devices.

crossfade.title: Crossfade & gapless
crossfade.desc: Albums play without the black hole between tracks. The next song slides over the top — no clicks, no pause.

syncedLyrics.title: Synced lyrics
syncedLyrics.desc: Lyrics travel line-by-line with the vocal. Fullscreen mode turns the player into karaoke without a third app.

uploads.title: Your tracks in the cloud
uploads.desc: Upload a rare release or your own track — it lives next to Tidal in your library. Likes, playlists, queue — same as ever.

shareLink.title: Playlist by one link
shareLink.desc: Send a URL — the other person opens it and hears exactly the same. No sign-up, no «install our app» banner.

daily.title: Bratan Daily
daily.subtitle: A fresh mix every day, tuned to you.
daily.premiumHint: Subscribe to get a personal mix every day.

uploads.title: My uploads
uploads.dropzoneHint: MP3 or FLAC, up to 50 MB
uploads.deleteHint: The file will be gone forever.
uploads.pageHint: Your own audio files. Up to 50 MB each. MP3, FLAC, AAC, WAV.

auth_more.loginRequiredHint: Sign in with Telegram to use the app.
auth_more.logoutHint: Your saved settings stay in the cloud.

fullscreenPlayer.radioTitle: Start a radio based on this track

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.error: Couldn't load lyrics. Try again later.
lyrics.empty: No lyrics available for this track.

admin.heading: Admin tools
admin.usersHint: Search, filters, gift subscriptions, bans and roles.

empty.title: No matches
empty.hint: Clear the filters or refine your query.

equalizer.title: Equalizer
equalizer.hint: Start any track and the sliders will start shaping the sound — current values are saved and applied automatically.
equalizer.curveAria: Parametric equalizer. Ten bands — drag any node or click on the curve to tweak gain.

wave.title: Your wave. Tuned to your taste.
wave.body: An endless stream tuned to you. Every like, skip and replay teaches the wave more — hit "Start the wave" and go.

waveSettings.title: Fine-tune the wave.
waveSettings.body: Dial in a mood (chill / workout / party) and a character (familiar / discover / popular). Stack them, reset them in one click.

ai.title: AI playlist from a prompt.
ai.body: Describe what you want — "tracks for a run with guitar riffs" — and the player builds a playlist around that vibe.

daily.title: Today's playlists.
daily.body: Three flavours every day: Familiar (your loves), Discovery (new picks for your taste), Mood (matched to time of day and history). Refreshed every morning.

recent.title: Recently played.
recent.body: Your last tracks one tap away. Hit any of them and we resume from there as a queue.

search.title: Search without borders.
search.body: 100M+ tracks, albums and artists in a single field. No genre walls, no paid regions, no infinite-scroll feeds.

library.title: Your library, your call.
library.body: Likes, playlists, history and uploads — all your collections under one tab. Likes are the strongest signal to your recommendations.

subscription.title: Subscription: lossless + uncensored.
subscription.body: 99 Stars/mo: 24-bit lossless, unlimited listening, and the right to replace any censored track with your own version. Only you hear the edits.

reset.tourHint: Show the in-app hints from the start.
reset.recommendationsHint: Wipes your taste profile, dislikes and daily playlists. Listening history stays put.
reset.historyHint: Removes every entry from your play history. Bookmarks, playlists and taste profile stay untouched.
reset.tourHintLong: Plays the eight-step product tour again on the next page load.
reset.tourDoneLine: Done — the tour will start in a second.

tidal.title: Tidal accounts
tidal.headerHint: Tidal account proxy pool. The worker hands out streams round-robin (LRU) and auto-disables an account after 5 errors in a row. Add an account via refresh token or the device-flow on link.tidal.com.
tidal.addHint: Drop Tidal accounts here — we'll round-robin them for streaming.
tidal.empty: Pool is empty. Add the first account — refresh token or device-flow.

form.refreshTokenHint: The worker swaps your refresh token for an access token and pulls the subscription tier. An account with the same Tidal user id refreshes its tokens without duplicating.
form.deviceHint: Sign in via the Tidal site: hit "Start", get a short code, type it on link.tidal.com and confirm. The worker creates or updates the pool entry automatically.

confirm.removeAccount: Remove account from the pool? This is irreversible.

adminFlag.title: User admin flags
adminFlag.hint: Grant or revoke admin rights. Accepts a TG user id or @username.

userPurge.title: Purge user
userPurge.hint: Wipes the user, their playlists, uploads and history. Permanent.
userPurge.hintLong: Deletes uploads, playlists, listening history and every other piece of data tied to the selected user. This can't be undone.

health.title: Service health
health.headerHint: One glance covers it all: Tidal pool alive, D1 writes, R2 not over, crons ran today.

grant.title: Grant subscription
grant.hint: User ID or @username plus the number of days.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.hint: It may have been deleted, or the URL is wrong.

shared_page.loginToContinue: Sign in to add to your library

errors_more.rateLimit: Too many requests, slow down a bit
errors_more.sessionRefreshFailed: Couldn't refresh the session — please try again

playlistCard.confirmDescription: “{name}” will be deleted along with all of its tracks. This cannot be undone.
playlistCard.confirmDescriptionLinked: “{name}” will stop showing up in your library. The original stays put — you can save it again later.

override.title: Override file
override.currentVersion: Your file is what plays right now. Replace it with a new upload or remove it to fall back to the original.

exploreList.pageless: This module doesn't support paginated browsing.

explorePlaylist.empty: This playlist doesn't have any tracks yet.

dailyPage.notFound: We couldn't find this daily playlist — it may have expired. Fresh picks arrive every morning.
dailyPage.empty: This playlist doesn't have any tracks yet.

sharedPage.unavailableHint: The owner may have unpublished it or the link has expired.
sharedPage.empty: This playlist doesn't have any tracks yet.

artistPicker.subheading: One is enough — we'll build a wave from their track radio and similar artists, then keep tuning to whatever you actually play.

wave.emptyHint: Your wave is empty — pick a few genres in onboarding to seed it

image.canvasUnavailable: This browser can't open a 2D canvas
image.compressFailed: Couldn't compress the image down to the size limit.

offline.bannerOffline: You're offline — showing saved content only
offline.partialSavedDescription: {{saved}} of {{total}} tracks landed on your device. Tap again to download the rest.
offline.saveFailedDescription: None of the tracks made it to the device. Check the connection and try again.
offline.unsaveDescription: Pick whether the saved tracks should leave with the collection or stay on the device.
offline.unsaveOptionDeleteAllAlbumDescription: Frees device storage. Songs that other saved playlists also reference will stay.
offline.unsaveOptionDeleteAllPlaylistDescription: Frees device storage. Songs that other saved playlists or albums also reference will stay.
offline.unsaveOptionKeepTracksAlbumDescription: Drops the album view but keeps every saved song available offline.
offline.unsaveOptionKeepTracksPlaylistDescriptio: Drops the playlist view but keeps every saved song available offline.

appUpdate.availableHint: Your downloaded tracks will be kept
